name: Supabase MCP
description: Official Supabase MCP server. Lets AI agents manage Postgres databases, run queries, handle migrations, store pgvector embeddings, and control Supabase projects end-to-end.

skills.name: Postgres Query
skills.description: Execute arbitrary SQL queries against Supabase Postgres from any MCP-compatible agent

skills.name: Schema Management
skills.description: Create tables, run migrations, and inspect schema metadata via MCP tools

skills.name: pgvector Store
skills.description: Store and query vector embeddings in Postgres with pgvector similarity search

skills.name: Storage Operations
skills.description: Upload, download, and manage files in Supabase Storage buckets from an AI agent

skills.name: Edge Functions
skills.description: Deploy and invoke Supabase Edge Functions programmatically from agent workflows
